name: Alejandro Olmedo
title: Intermediate Software Engineer | Backend Developer | TypeScript · Node.js · Cloud
summary: Backend Software Engineer with 5+ years of experience designing, building, and maintaining APIs and microservices on AWS and GCP. Proficient in TypeScript (Node.js), with a proven track record of delivering serverless, event-driven, and container-based architectures. Certified as an AWS Developer and GCP Associate Cloud Engineer with a strong foundation in software development best practices, infrastructure as code, observability, and CI/CD. A clear communicator dedicated to bridging the gap between technical requirements and product goals to ship scalable software.

bullets: Involved in the end-to-end development lifecycle of a consumer facing smart devices platform for the Canadian market.
Architected serverless solutions using TypeScript, AWS Lambda, DynamoDB, and API Gateway to build both end-user and platform services.
Engineered a telemetry solution using InfluxDB to store and aggregate IoT devices data points, generating optimized API responses for real-time mobile application charts.
Maintained microservices infrastructure using AWS CDK, ensuring adherence to DevOps best practices and CI/CD requirements.
Co-led a team of engineers to build an event-driven microservice using EventBridge Bus and Scheduler for platform events and end-user scheduled routines.
Orchestrated task prioritization and design reviews using Agile/Kanban methodologies, aligning technical execution with business impact.
Integrated AWS CloudWatch custom metrics and alarms to monitor production environment services health and ensure high system availability.
Participated in on-call engineer rotations to support the production environment and troubleshoot issues.
Contributed to the development of a business-to-business platform used by major Canadian telecommunications companies to manage internal contractual relationships.
Developed event-driven microservices using TypeScript, GCP Pub/Sub, and Firestore as the primary data store.
Implemented a Redis caching layer for a NestJS API, transitioning data retrieval from linear to constant time complexity while optimizing for scalability.
Optimized cloud infrastructure and Kubernetes configurations using Terraform to enhance application performance and system load handling.

certifications.name: Google Cloud Certified Associate Cloud Engineer
